fields.name: Memory Snapshot
fields.description: Inject active memory entries (user profile and agent notes) from linked Hippocampus engrams.

fields.name: Skills Index
fields.description: Compact table of skill-tagged engrams intersecting enabled tools.

fields.name: Platform Hint
fields.description: Gateway platform-specific response constraints (Discord, Telegram, CLI).

fields.name: Tool Guidance
fields.description: Extra tool-use encouragement when the prior turn used a weaker tool-calling model.
